scripts.deploy:staging: vite build --mode staging && firebase deploy --only hosting -P staging && git add . && git commit -m "Despliegue automatico a Staging" && git push origin main
scripts.deploy:prod: vite build --mode production && firebase deploy --only hosting -P production
scripts.postdev: git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "auto-save fin jornada" && git push
